description_short: This throw is closely knitted and made out of 100% cotton. Perfect to snuggle with and to add warmth to your living room.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash delicate cycle, cold water, mild detergent. No bleach/softeners. Air dry.

faq_specs.question: What are some standout features of SleepyCat's Knitted Throw?
faq_specs.answer: Our Knitted Throws are made of 100% premium cotton yarns that are free of any harmful substances. These throws do not shrink after wash and are highly durable.

notes_observed: Smaller than muslin (49x59 vs 85x59), but heavier (1.2kg vs 0.52kg) — thicker knit for cooler weather. Sofa decor positioning.
